content:
Why Sorbet Leopard?

Sorbet Leopard is a community-maintained fork of Mac OS X 10.5 Leopard optimized for PowerPC Macs. It includes security backports, performance improvements, and essential software.

System Requirements

  • PowerMac G4 with 512MB RAM (1GB recommended)
  • DVD drive or USB boot capability
  • 10GB free space

Installation

Download the ISO. Burn to DVD or write to USB. Boot holding Option key, select installer, follow prompts.
